generated_oml:
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position encoder for motor in first axis drive"
    DTDFVocab:producedData PositionData
]

instance SecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary position encoder behind gearbox for first axis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData PositionData
]

instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor for motor in first axis drive"
    DTDFVocab:producedData IM_Data
]

instance PositionData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder, SecondaryEncoder
]

instance IM_Data : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
]

instance VelocityData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder, SecondaryEncoder
]

instance AccelerationData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder, SecondaryEncoder
]

instance PositionDataValue : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Position data from encoders for first axis"
    DTDFVocab:fromData PositionData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysML_Tool, Simulink
]

instance IM_DataValue : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Motor current data (I_M) from sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData IM_Data
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Simulink, AAS_Enabler
]

instance VelocityDataValue : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular velocity data derived from position encoders"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VelocityData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Simulink
]

instance AccelerationDataValue : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Acceleration data derived from position encoders"
    DTDFVocab:fromData AccelerationData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Simulink
]

instance TorqueDataValue : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Torque data derived from motor current and simulation models"
    DTDFVocab:fromData IM_Data
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Simulink, AAS_Enabler
]

instance SysML_Tool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML modeling tools for structural system design"
    DTDFVocab:enables SysML_ModelingService
]

instance Simulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks MATLAB Simulink for simulation and modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionAnalysisService
]

instance MQTT_Protocol : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time data streaming"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionAnalysisService
]

instance SINUMERIK_840D_SL : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller for data acquisition"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionAnalysisService
]

instance AAS_Enabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells for traceability and data management"
    DTDFVocab:enables AAS_TraceabilityService
]

instance Dashboard_Visualization : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualization software for real-time monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:enables DashboardVisualizationService
]

instance FrictionAnalysisService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous identification and analysis of joint friction using white-box and black-box models for motion accuracy improvement"
    DTDFVocab:provides JointFrictionDynamicsInsight, FrictionModelParameterUpdateInsight
]

instance DashboardVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Integrated visualization via dashboard for understanding physical relationships in the robot's first axis"
    DTDFVocab:provides PhysicalRelationshipInsight
]

instance AAS_TraceabilityService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Traceability and data management using Asset Administration Shells"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataTraceabilityInsight
]

instance SysML_ModelingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Structural modeling using SysML BDD and IBD for first axis"
    DTDFVocab:provides StructuralModelInsight
]

instance JointFrictionDynamicsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insights into joint friction dynamics for improving motion control accuracy"
]

instance FrictionModelParameterUpdateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Parameter updates for friction models based on real-time data comparison"
]

instance PhysicalRelationshipInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Understanding physical relationships in the robot's first axis through dashboard visualization"
]

instance DataTraceabilityInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Traceability of data sources and models via Asset Administration Shells"
]

instance StructuralModelInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Structural integrity and system configuration insights from SysML models"
]

instance SysML_BDD : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram for structural modeling of first axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysML_Tool
]

instance SysML_IBD : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagram for structural modeling of first axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysML_Tool
]

instance Simulink_MotorModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink simulation model for permanent magnet synchronous motor in first axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Simulink
]

instance Simulink_GearwheelModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink simulation model for gearwheel in first axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Simulink
]

instance Simulink_GearboxModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink simulation model for cycloidal gearbox in first axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Simulink
]

instance Coulomb_Viscous_FrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Coulomb-Viscous friction model for joint friction dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Simulink
]

instance Stribeck_FrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Stribeck friction model for joint friction dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Simulink
]

instance Dahl_FrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dahl friction model for joint friction dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Simulink
]

instance LuGre_FrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "LuGre friction model for joint friction dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Simulink
]

instance RobotFirstAxis : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "First axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot with positional accuracy of 0.1 mm and functional reach of 2 m"
    base:contains MotorEncoder, SecondaryEncoder, MotorCurrentSensor, SysML_BDD, SysML_IBD, Simulink_MotorModel, Simulink_GearwheelModel, Simulink_GearboxModel, Coulomb_Viscous_FrictionModel, Stribeck_FrictionModel, Dahl_FrictionModel, LuGre_FrictionModel, IM_DataValue, PositionDataValue, VelocityDataValue, AccelerationDataValue, TorqueDataValue
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The digital shadow does not transmit data back to the physical system as it is a passive entity with one-way data flow"
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time synchronization with live sensor data streaming; friction model identification occurs continuously during robot operation"
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Single digital shadow instance integrating SysML structural models, Simulink simulation models, live sensor data via MQTT, AAS for traceability, and dashboard visualization for friction analysis and motion accuracy improvement"
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operational phase (as operated) focusing on real-time monitoring and friction analysis during active robot use"
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Validation through comparison of simulated data against measured data; multi-physics models address wear and environmental changes; uncertainty managed via continuous identification during operation"
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time sensor data streaming from physical robot to digital shadow"
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "SysML for modeling, Asset Administration Shell (AAS) standards, and RFLP methodology for system engineering"
]
